category_sources: source_facts.description: Look up records for one or more IPs/networks in one or more .mmdb databases.
display_name_sources: Official MaxMind GitHub repository is named mmdbinspect.
docs_sources: Official maxmind/mmdbinspect GitHub README is the primary official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/maxmind/mmdbinspect, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official repository context is MaxMind's mmdbinspect CLI.
source_facts.description identifies IP/network record lookup in .mmdb databases.
